name: ai-tool
description: Codex skills and utilities for LLM Wiki, PR review, rubric design, and AI feedback logging workflows.

interface.shortDescription: LLM Wiki, PR review, review-apply, rubric design, and feedback logging skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: AI Tool packages Codex skills for maintaining LLM Wiki knowledge bases, reviewing GitHub pull requests, applying PR review feedback, designing scoring rubrics, and logging AI output dissatisfaction as structured feedback records.
defaultPrompt: Use $feedback-ai-logging to record AI output dissatisfaction as a feedback log.
Use $llm-wiki to build or query an interlinked Markdown knowledge base.
Use $pr-review to post review findings on the current PR.
Use $pr-review-apply to apply current PR review feedback.
Use $rubric-design to design or calibrate scoring rubrics.
